ddls:
CREATE TABLE "radio_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radio station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the radio station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the radio station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the radio station */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the radio station broadcasts (e.g., FM, AM) */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the radio station */,
  "listener_count" INTEGER /* The estimated number of listeners */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the radio station was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the radio station information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist performs */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the artist was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performs the song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date when the song was released */,
  "album" TEXT /* The name of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* The lyrics of the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the song was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the song information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radio station where the song was played */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was played */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the song was played */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of listener impressions for the play event */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the play event (in seconds) */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* The type of play (e.g., live, pre-recorded) */,
  "play_order" INTEGER /* The order in which the song was played in the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the play event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the play event information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radio station that owns the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the playlist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist that contains the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  "play_order" INTEGER /* The order in which the song appears in the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the song was added to the playlist */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the song order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_files" (
  "music_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music file */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that the music file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the music file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the music file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the music file (e.g., MP3, WAV) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* The date when the music file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the music file was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the music file information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("music_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_files_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., station admin, music manager, advertiser) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the advertiser */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the advertiser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the advertiser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the advertiser was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the advertiser information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "ad_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad campaign */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser that ran the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the ad campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* The objective of the ad campaign (e.g., brand awareness, sales) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the ad campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* The number of impressions for the ad campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* The number of clicks for the ad campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* The number of conversions resulting from the ad campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the ad campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the ad campaign information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)
